name: treeui
description: TreeUi — Premium AI Chat Client for OpenAI, Claude, and Gemini

scripts.build-android: npm run prepare-www && npx cap sync android
scripts.build-apk: npm run build-android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleDebug && echo '\n✅ APK ready at: android/app/build/outputs/apk/debug/app-debug.apk'
scripts.build-apk-release: npm run build-android && cd android && ./gradlew assembleRelease && echo '\n✅ Release APK ready at: android/app/build/outputs/apk/release/'

author: TreeUi
